# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

namespace = subjecthood_events
subjecthood_events.3 = { # Advance - Emperor of the [X]
	type = country_event
	placement = root
	title = subjecthood_events.3.t
	desc = subjecthood_events.3.d
	flavor = subjecthood_events.3.f
	duration = 3
	event_image = {
		video = "votp_monarch_holding_court"
	}
	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/event_portrait.dds"

	cooldown = { days = normal_modifier_time }

	category = enactment

	trigger = {
		is_abolishing_subjecthood = yes
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		ruler ?= {
			NOT = { age < define:NCharacters|ADULT_AGE }
			has_reactionary_ideology = no
			save_temporary_scope_as = ruler_scope
		}
		any_primary_culture = {
			shares_heritage_trait_group_with_culture = scope:ruler_scope.culture
			shares_language_trait_group_with_culture = scope:ruler_scope.culture
		}
		NOT = {
			currently_enacting_law = {
				has_amendment = amendment_type:amendment_sovereign_of_the_nation
			}
		}
	}

	cancellation_trigger = {
		NOT = {
			exists = root.currently_enacting_law
		}
	}

	immediate = {
		ruler = {
			save_scope_as = ruler_scope
		}
		random_primary_culture = {
			limit = {
				shares_heritage_trait_group_with_culture = scope:ruler_scope.culture
				shares_language_trait_group_with_culture = scope:ruler_scope.culture
			}
			save_scope_as = relevant_primary_culture
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_primary_culture = {
					shares_heritage_trait_group_with_culture = scope:ruler_scope.culture
					shares_language_trait_group_with_culture = scope:ruler_scope.culture
					count > 1
				}
			}
			random_primary_culture = {
				limit = {
					shares_heritage_trait_group_with_culture = scope:ruler_scope.culture
					shares_language_trait_group_with_culture = scope:ruler_scope.culture
					NOT = {
						scope:relevant_primary_culture ?= this
					}
				}
				save_scope_as = relevant_primary_culture_2
			}
		}
		ig:ig_petty_bourgeoisie ?= {
			save_scope_as = petty_bourgeoisie_ig
		}
		currently_enacting_law = {
    		save_scope_as = current_law_scope
    	}
	}

	option = {
		name = subjecthood_events.3.a
		default_option = yes
		add_enactment_modifier = {
			name = modifier_empire_of_the_nation
		}
		active_law:lawgroup_governance_principles ?= {
			add_amendment = {
				type = amendment_sovereign_of_the_nation
				sponsor = scope:petty_bourgeoisie_ig
				cooldown = 120
			}
		}
		scope:ruler_scope = {
			add_modifier = {
				name = modifier_emperor_of_the_nation
				days = long_modifier_time
			}
		}
		ig:ig_devout ?= {
			add_modifier = {
				name = modifier_compromised_divine_right
				days = long_modifier_time
			}
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = subjecthood_events.3.b
		ig:ig_devout ?= {
			add_modifier = {
				name = modifier_upheld_divine_right
				days = long_modifier_time
			}
		}
		add_loyalists = {
			pop_type = aristocrats
			value = large_radicals
		}
	}
}

subjecthood_events.5 = { # Stall - Aristocrats get really mad about the French Revolution
	type = country_event
	placement = root
	title = subjecthood_events.5.t
	desc = subjecthood_events.5.d
	flavor = subjecthood_events.5.f
	duration = 3
	event_image = {
		video = "europenorthamerica_rich_and_poor"
	}
	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/event_protest.dds"

	cooldown = { days = normal_modifier_time }

	category = enactment

	trigger = {
		is_abolishing_subjecthood = yes
		OR = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy_or_variant = yes
			has_law_or_variant =  law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		any_interest_group = {
			OR = {
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_hierarchic
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_integralist
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_traditionalist
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_traditionalist_minoritarian
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_theocrat
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_legitimist
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_corporatist_leader
			}
		}
	}

	cancellation_trigger = {
		NOT = {
			exists = root.currently_enacting_law
		}
	}

	immediate = {
		random_primary_culture = {
			save_scope_as = relevant_primary_culture
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				any_primary_culture = {
					count > 1
				}
			}
			random_primary_culture = {
				limit = {
					NOT = {
						scope:relevant_primary_culture ?= this
					}
				}
				save_scope_as = relevant_primary_culture_2
			}
		}
		currently_enacting_law = {
    		save_scope_as = current_law_scope
    	}
		generate_1_noble_name = {
			CULTURE_1 = primary_culture
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = subjecthood_events.5.a
		default_option = yes
		add_enactment_modifier = {
			name = modifier_clinging_to_privilege
		}
		clear_generated_names = yes
	}

	option = {
		name = subjecthood_events.5.b
		add_enactment_modifier = {
			name = modifier_first_among_the_nation
		}
		random_interest_group = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_ideology = ideology:ideology_liberal
					has_ideology = ideology:ideology_liberal_modern
					leader = {
						OR = {
							has_ideology = ideology:ideology_republican_leader
							has_ideology = ideology:ideology_radical
							has_ideology = ideology:ideology_ethno_nationalist
							has_socialist_ideology = yes
						}
					}
				}
			}
			add_modifier = {
				name = modifier_citizenship_compromises
				days = normal_modifier_time
			}
		}
		clear_generated_names = yes
	}

	option = {
		name = subjecthood_events.5.c
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
			}
		}
		highlighted_option = yes
		activate_law = scope:current_law_scope.type
		add_radicals = {
			value = large_radicals
			pop_type = aristocrats
		}
		add_radicals = {
			value = large_radicals
			pop_type = clergymen
		}
		add_radicals = {
			value = medium_radicals
			pop_type = peasants
		}
		clear_generated_names = yes
	}
}
